name: rn-dev-agent
description: React Native development and testing plugin for live CDP introspection, device control, Maestro action replay, and proof capture.

interface.shortDescription: Verify React Native apps with live device evidence
interface.longDescription: Use React Native app introspection, native simulator/emulator control, Maestro action replay, and proof-capture workflows from Codex. Claude Code keeps its slash-command and agent surface in packages/claude-plugin; Codex uses the package-local shared skills and MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Set up rn-dev-agent for this React Native app.
Verify this React Native feature on a simulator.
Debug the current React Native screen with live evidence.
